channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DAMOINDUS] Damodar Industries Promoter Arun Biyani pledges 70,000 shares
item.description:
Damodar Industries Ltd. announced that its promoter, Arun Kumar Biyani, has disclosed the creation of a new pledge on 70,000 equity shares of the company. This pledge, made on March 27, 2026, represents 0.23% of the company's total share capital. Following this event, the total number of encumbered shares held by the promoter group stands at 52,10,000, which constitutes 4.47% of the total share capital. The disclosure was made under Regulation 31(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Promoter Arun Kumar Biyani pledged 70,000 Damodar Industries shares.
  • The pledged shares represent 0.23% of the company's total capital.
  • The pledge was created on March 27, 2026.
  • Total promoter encumbered shares are now 4.47% of total capital.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DAMODAR INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [KRN] KRN clarifies significant share price movement is market-driven
item.description:
KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd received a letter from BSE regarding a significant movement in its equity share price. In response, the company clarified that the observed price fluctuation is purely market-driven. KRN affirmed that it has made all necessary disclosures and announcements as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company also stated that there is no pending announcement or price-sensitive information that could impact the price or volume behavior of its shares.

  • KRN received a BSE query on significant share price movement.
  • Company states price movement is purely market-driven.
  • All required disclosures under SEBI LODR Regulation 30 are complete.
  • No pending price-sensitive information to disclose.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KRN Heat Exchanger And Refrigeration Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [TEGA] Tega Industries incorporates Tega Solutions, a wholly owned subsidiary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tega Industries Limited has announced the incorporation of its wholly owned subsidiary, Tega Solutions Limited (TSL), in India. The Certificate of Incorporation was received on April 17, 2026, with the company officially incorporated on April 01, 2026. TSL has an Authorized Share Capital of ₹100 crore and a Paid-up Share Capital of ₹99 crore. The primary objective of TSL is to provide management consultancy services and function as a Global Capability Centre, including a Global Cost Centre, for various entities. TSL is considered a related party and is yet to commence its business operations. The incorporation was completed for cash consideration, with Tega Industries acquiring 100% shareholding.

  • Tega Industries incorporated Tega Solutions Limited as a wholly owned subsidiary.
  • The new subsidiary has an authorized share capital of ₹100 crore.
  • Tega Solutions will provide management consultancy and act as a Global Capability Centre.
  • The subsidiary is a related party and is yet to commence commercial operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tega Industries Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [TEXRAIL] Texmaco Rail Bags
item.description:
This JSON object defines a person's profile with their name, age, email, and a list of interests. It's a simple structure for storing basic personal information.

  • Represents a person's profile.
  • Includes name, age, and email.
  • Features a list of interests.
  • Simple and common JSON structure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO RAIL & ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: Other

item.title: [INFY*] Infosys Board Appoints Diane Jurgens, Re-appoints Helene Potier
item.description:
Infosys's Board of Directors has approved the appointment of Diane Enberg Jurgens as an additional and independent director for a three-year term, effective April 22, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. Ms. Jurgens brings extensive experience in technology, P&L leadership, and transformation, having served as CIO for The Walt Disney Company and CTO at BHP. She also holds board positions at Standard Chartered and World 50. Additionally, the Board approved the re-appointment of Helene Auriol Potier as an independent director for a second five-year term, from May 26, 2026, to May 25, 2031, also subject to shareholder approval. Both directors meet the criteria for independent directorship and have no relationship with other board members, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.

  • Infosys appoints Diane Jurgens as an independent director for three years.
  • Helene Potier re-appointed as independent director for a second five-year term.
  • Both appointments are effective April 2026 and subject to shareholder approval.
  • Diane Jurgens brings strong tech and P&L leadership experience to the board.
  • Strengthens board with diverse global technology and business expertise.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFOSYS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge: M&A Head Anup Kumar, IR Head Manish Hemrajani Resign
item.description:
Coforge Ltd has announced changes in its Senior Management Personnel, with Anup Kumar, EVP & Head M&A, and Manish Hemrajani, Head of Investors Relations, tendering their resignations. Both executives will cease their roles at the close of business hours on April 17, 2026 (USA). Anup Kumar, who joined in May 2025, noted a successful two-year tenure, during which Coforge executed five acquisitions (Xceltrait, TMLabs, Rythmos, Opt ML, Encora), integrated Cigniti, and divested the non-core Advantage Go business. Under his leadership, the company's revenue reportedly scaled from $1.1 billion to $2.5 billion post-Encora acquisition.

  • Coforge announced resignations of two senior management personnel.
  • Anup Kumar, EVP & Head M&A, and Manish Hemrajani, IR Head, resigned.
  • Both executives will cease their roles on April 17, 2026.
  • Anup Kumar oversaw 5 acquisitions and 1 divestment in two years.
  • Company revenue grew from $1.1B to $2.5B under M&A leadership.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NTPC] NTPC Group adds 87.50 MW solar capacity via NGEL subsidiary
item.description:
NTPC Ltd's subsidiary, NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), announced the declaration of Commercial Operation Date (COD) for 87.50 MW of solar capacity. This capacity is part of a larger 150 MW solar project located in Rajasthan, developed by Project Eleven Renewable Power Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of NGEL's joint venture. The COD is effective from April 19, 2026. This addition increases the NTPC Group's total installed capacity to 89,615 MW and commercial capacity to 88,535 MW. For the NGEL Group, its total installed capacity will rise to 10,363.90 MW.

  • NGEL declared COD for 87.50 MW solar capacity in Rajasthan.
  • This capacity is part of a 150 MW solar project.
  • NTPC Group's total installed capacity now stands at 89,615 MW.
  • NGEL Group's installed capacity increases to 10,363.90 MW.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NTPC LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade: Promoter Group member acquires 42 Lac shares via Rights Issue
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd received a disclosure from Ssamta Amar Gaala, a member of its Promoter Group, regarding the acquisition of 42,00,000 equity shares. The acquisition was executed through a Rights Issue on April 13, 2026. This transaction increased Ssamta Amar Gaala's shareholding in the company from 2.18% (1,25,00,000 shares) to 2.39% (1,67,00,000 shares). The disclosure was made under Regulation 7(1)(b) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Promoter Group member Ssamta Amar Gaala acquired shares.
  • 42,00,000 equity shares were acquired by the promoter.
  • The acquisition was made through a Rights Issue.
  • Shareholding increased from 2.18% to 2.39% post-acquisition.
  • Disclosure filed under SEBI PIT Regulations 7(1)(b).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Promoter Group Increases Stake by 0.20% via Rights Issue
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd's promoter group, comprising Ssamta Amar Gaala and Amar Gaala, has increased its shareholding in the company. The group acquired 42,00,000 equity shares, representing a 0.20% stake, through a rights issue on April 13, 2026. Prior to this acquisition, the promoter group held 1,25,00,000 shares (2.19%). Following the acquisition, their total holding stands at 1,67,00,000 shares, which represents 2.18% of the company's total equity share capital after the rights issue. This disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Enbee's promoter group acquired 42 lakh additional shares.
  • The acquisition represents a 0.20% increase in their stake.
  • Shares were acquired through a rights issue on April 13, 2026.
  • Promoter holding now totals 1.67 crore shares, or 2.18%.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PSTITANIA] PS Titania FY26 Audit: No Modified Opinion from Statutory Auditors
item.description:
Propshare Titania SM REIT (Second Scheme) announced that its Statutory Auditors have not expressed any modified opinion in the Audit Reports for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure indicates a clean audit report, suggesting that the financial statements present a true and fair view of the company's financial position and performance without any significant reservations from the auditors. This is generally viewed positively by investors, reflecting sound financial reporting and corporate governance.

  • Statutory Auditors issued a clean audit report for FY26.
  • No modified opinion indicates financial statements are fair.
  • Positive for investor confidence and corporate governance.
  • Applies to Propshare Titania SM REIT (Second Scheme).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second scheme of the Property Share Investment Trust) | Category: Auditor
